scripts.build:develop: env-cmd -f .env.develop node scripts/generate-registry.js && env-cmd -f .env.develop next build
scripts.build:staging: env-cmd -f .env.staging node scripts/generate-registry.js && env-cmd -f .env.staging next build
scripts.build:production: env-cmd -f .env.production node scripts/generate-registry.js && env-cmd -f .env.production next build
